name: tailcall
description: TailCall CLI for managing and optimizing GraphQL configurations

options.name: --schema
options.description: Display the schema of the composition spec

options.name: --format
options.description: Change the format of the input file

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Launch the GraphQL Server for the specific configuration

subcommands.name: gen
subcommands.description: Generate GraphQL configurations from various sources
